user.title: Divoom Pixoo (SPP bridge)
user.description: Point at your untether_spp ESP32 bridge — the host and TCP port it serves the Pixoo's SPP stream on.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the bridge at that host:port.

push_solid.name: Push solid colour
push_solid.description: Fill the whole 16x16 panel with one RGB colour.

rgb.name: Colour
rgb.description: RGB colour to fill the panel with.

push_image.name: Push still image
push_image.description: Push a 16x16 still from a palette and 256 row-major palette indices.

upload_animation.name: Upload animation
upload_animation.description: Upload an animation that then loops on-device. One shared palette (<=16 colours).

palette.name: Palette
palette.description: Shared flattened RGB palette (up to 16 colours).

frames.name: Frames
frames.description: List of frames; each is 256 palette indices.
